name: LeapFrog Learning Friends 100 Words Book
bullets: Meet learning friends Turtle, Tiger and Monkey who will introduce more than 100 age-appropriate words chosen by learning experts
Word categories include: pets, animals, food, mealtime, colors, activities, opposites, outside and more
Touching the words on the pages plays the words, sound effects and fun facts; hear the Learning Friends theme song and My Favorite Word by pressing the light-up star button
Words, songs and instructions can be heard in both English and Spanish for a full bilingual experience
Intended for ages 18+ months; requires 2 AA batteries; batteries included for demo purposes only; new batteries recommended for regular use. Product Dimensions: 9.4" wide x 9.2" height x 1.9" depth
description: Join animal friends Turtle, Tiger and Monkey as they explore new vocabulary in the Learning Friends 100 Words Book. Explore the colorful pages and touch each picture to hear the animals say toddler-appropriate words along with exciting facts and sound effects. Immerse your child in bilingual play by sliding the language switch to hear the words, songs and instructions in Spanish. Touch the pictures to hear silly sound effects in Fun Sounds mode or press the light-up star button to hear two learning songs. Discover new vocabulary with cute learning friends! Intended for ages 18+ months. Require

reviews.name: Tracey
reviews.title: Interactive and educational!
reviews.body: The media could not be loaded. We’ve had this book for a while now, and it’s a staple in our house. It’s incredibly durable and has held up well to daily use. My child loves touching the pictures to hear the animal sounds. I really appreciate that it’s bilingual (English/Spanish), which adds a lot of value. It keeps my toddler engaged for long periods, and it’s been fantastic for their…

reviews.name: Alejandro Reviews
reviews.title: Great Educational Book
reviews.body: Easy to use and keeps kids engaged while learning letters, words, and sounds. Good quality and educational. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

reviews.name: Flor Bonilla
reviews.title: Very good for children.
reviews.body: It's perfect for kids; it teaches them a lot and helps them learn in both languages.

reviews.name: MrsSchmidt
reviews.title: Great Early Learning Toy for Vocabulary Practice
reviews.body: This LeapFrog 100 Words Book is a great option for toddlers and preschoolers who are learning new words.I like that it makes vocabulary practice feel like play. Kids can touch, listen, repeat, and explore words at their own pace, which is perfect for that stage where they want to do the same thing over and over again.As a mom, I appreciate toys that feel educational without requiring me to turn…
